name: hsp70_87A_cluster_chr3R
description: Heat-shock protein 70 cluster at cytological band 87A on chr3R. Contains two tandem hsp70 paralogs (Hsp70Aa, Hsp70Ab) separated by a divergent intergenic spacer. Together with the 87C cluster (Hsp70Ba, Bb, Bbb, Bc) these encode the inducible Hsp70 proteins. ~95-99% nucleotide identity between paralogs — extremely difficult to resolve with short reads.
expected_copy_count: 2 tandem hsp70 paralogs at 87A; combined with 87C totals 5-6 hsp70 copies
